duration_trend.note: Slight downward trend in runtime for the 4 newest videos vs the 4 oldest of this sample (~3 min shorter on average), driven mainly by the 14:59 short-form 'Why Putin Is So Hard to Kill' outlier pulling the newest-4 average down. Excluding that outlier, newest videos are still in the 27-38 min band consistent with older ones -- no strong systemic shortening, more like increased format variance (one much shorter video mixed into the usual 25-40 min range).

palette_trend: Thumbnails follow Fern's established high-contrast documentary style: dark/desaturated background photo or illustration (blacks, grays, muted blues/reds) with a bold white or yellow sans-serif headline-style text overlay, often a red/orange accent element (blood, warning color, flag) to draw the eye. Consistent branding across all 8 -- no visible shift in palette this cycle, still leaning toward somber, journalistic, true-crime/geopolitical mood boards rather than bright clickbait colors.
